summary: Muffled recording detracts from a solid second half that fires after the drums
review: The performance picks up after the drum segment, delivering smoky, energetic playing that many fans would enjoy. However, the audio is described as really muffled, which hampers clarity and overall listening pleasure. The mixed feedback results in an overall lukewarm impression of this release.

ai_rating.rationale: One low‑star review (2) points out poor recording quality but notes the second half is strong; weighting favors show quality, yielding a modest rating around 2.5‑3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio described as muffled and lacking clarity throughout the set

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review highlights that everything after drums is especially strong, suggesting a good second‑half momentum
